rationale: Both reviews identify the exact same three scope violations in the diff (bundled AffineAlgGroup at l.35, premature/naive IsUnipotent on GroupLike at l.49, and True-stub Reductive/SemisimpleGroup at l.65) and prescribe the identical remedies (remove all three); acting on either yields the same resulting PR with none of the Layer 6 content present, and no review missed a material scope issue the other caught.
